name: icsme-skills
description: Depth pack for IEEE ICSME maintenance/evolution submissions: venue routing, the single-round early-decision research track and author-response rebuttal, double-anonymous EasyChair submission on the IEEEtran budget, Journal-First and Registered Reports and RENE tracks, MSR and technical-debt evidence, and the ROSE Festival IEEE artifact badges.

plugins.name: icsme-skills
plugins.description: Twelve ICSME-specific skills for the IEEE International Conference on Software Maintenance and Evolution, its single-round double-anonymous research track, and its Journal-First, Registered Reports, RENE, and ROSE-Festival artifact culture, grounded in the ICSME 2026 researchr call, IEEE Xplore, and dblp.
